ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number associated with the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident occurred */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block location of the incident */,
  "iucr" TEXT /* Illinois Uniform Crime Reporting code */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Primary classification of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "arrest" INTEGER /* Indicates whether an arrest was made */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the incident was domestic-related */,
  "beat" INTEGER /* Police beat number for the incident */,
  "district" INTEGER /* Police district related to the incident */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward number where the incident occurred */,
  "community_area" INTEGER /* Community area where the incident occurred */,
  "fbi_code" INTEGER /* FBI classification code for the incident */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate for the location (mapped) */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate for the location (mapped) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the incident was recorded */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the record */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the incident type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the location */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (open, closed, in progress) */,
  "incident_reporter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the incident reporter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_reporter_id") REFERENCES incident_reporters ("reporter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_community_area FOREIGN KEY ("community_area") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_iucr FOREIGN KEY ("iucr") REFERENCES types_of_crime ("iucr"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES types_of_crime ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_ward FOREIGN KEY ("ward") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types_of_crime" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of crime */,
  "iucr" TEXT /* Illinois Uniform Crime Reporting code associated with the crime type */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Primary classification of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the crime (felony, misdemeanor, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block description for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Street name for the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number identifying the police district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "commander_name" TEXT /* Name of the district commander */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_number" INTEGER /* Number identifying the city ward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ward */,
  "alderman_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward alderman */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "community_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community area */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the community area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident related to the arrest */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "charges" TEXT /* Charges associated with the arrest */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the arresting officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_arresting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident reporter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the incident reporter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the incident reporter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the incident reporter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" INTEGER /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the officer's district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_incidents" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the officer */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id", "incident_id")
)
